name: JDownloader 2
description: JDownloader 2 is a feature-rich download manager with a browser-based desktop, MyJDownloader integration, archive extraction, and automated handling for download links and file hosts.
author: jlesage

form_fields.label: MyJDownloader > Email
form_fields.hint: Email address used by your MyJDownloader account for remote access

form_fields.label: MyJDownloader > Password
form_fields.hint: Password for your MyJDownloader account

form_fields.label: MyJDownloader > Device Name
form_fields.hint: Optional device name shown in MyJDownloader for this instance

form_fields.label: Performance > Max Memory
form_fields.hint: Optional Java memory cap such as 2G, 1024M, or 512M; leave empty to auto-detect

form_fields.label: Display > Width
form_fields.hint: Width in pixels for the browser-based desktop session

form_fields.label: Display > Height
form_fields.hint: Height in pixels for the browser-based desktop session

form_fields.label: Display > Dark Mode
form_fields.hint: Enable dark mode for the browser wrapper interface

form_fields.label: Web UI > Enable Audio
form_fields.hint: Play container audio through the browser session

form_fields.label: Web UI > Enable File Manager
form_fields.hint: Expose a browser file manager for /config, /output, and other allowed paths

form_fields.label: Web UI > Allowed File Paths
form_fields.hint: Comma-separated container paths available to the web file manager; AUTO includes mapped volumes

form_fields.label: Web UI > Enable Terminal
form_fields.hint: Expose a browser terminal inside the container; best used with HTTPS enabled

form_fields.label: Security > Enable HTTPS
form_fields.hint: Serve the browser interface over HTTPS using generated or mounted certificates

form_fields.label: Security > Enable Web Auth
form_fields.hint: Protect the browser interface with a login page; set username and password below when enabled

form_fields.label: Security > Web Username
form_fields.hint: Single-user login name for web authentication

form_fields.label: Security > Web Password
form_fields.hint: Single-user password for web authentication

form_fields.label: Container > User ID
form_fields.hint: User ID used to own files created in mounted volumes

form_fields.label: Container > Group ID
form_fields.hint: Group ID used to own files created in mounted volumes

form_fields.label: Container > Language
form_fields.hint: Locale used by the container, for example en_US.UTF-8 or de_DE.UTF-8

form_fields.label: Container > Umask
form_fields.hint: Permissions mask for newly created files and folders inside /config and /output

form_fields.label: Container > Supplementary Group IDs
form_fields.hint: Comma-separated extra group IDs to help access shared storage with custom permissions

form_fields.label: Container > Keep App Running
form_fields.hint: Restart the desktop application automatically if it exits unexpectedly

form_fields.label: Container > Enable CJK Font
form_fields.hint: Install a font with broader Chinese, Japanese, and Korean character coverage
